source_rationale: PRG4 (lubricin/proteoglycan 4) is a marker of synovial fibroblasts in the lining layer
FBN1 (fibrillin-1) is an extracellular matrix gene characteristic of fibroblasts
PI16 is a well-established marker of universal/adventitial fibroblasts
MFAP5 (microfibril-associated protein 5) is expressed by matrix-producing fibroblasts
IGFBP5 is highly expressed in fibroblast populations and involved in ECM signaling
SFRP4 is a Wnt signaling modulator enriched in fibroblast subsets
FSTL1 (follistatin-like 1) is a secreted glycoprotein characteristic of fibroblasts
IL1RL1 (ST2) is a canonical marker of Th2 cells and tissue-resident T regulatory cells
KLRB1 (CD161) marks innate-like T cells including Th17 and ILC2 populations
RORA is a transcription factor critical for ILC2 and Th2 cell differentiation
HPGD is enriched in tissue-resident regulatory/Th2 T cells
IL7R (CD127) is a key marker of memory and tissue-resident T cells
SLAMF1 (CD150) is expressed on activated T cells and marks specific T helper subsets
IL32 is a pro-inflammatory cytokine highly expressed in activated T cells
KIT (CD117) is a receptor tyrosine kinase marking ILC progenitors and mast cell precursors or specific T cell subsets
IL7R marks memory/naive T cells and innate lymphoid cells
CCR6 is a chemokine receptor marking Th17 cells and mucosal-homing lymphocytes
LTB (lymphotoxin beta) is expressed by T cells and involved in lymphoid tissue organization

XCL1 (lymphotactin) is a chemokine produced by activated T cells and NK cells
